tests.name: Desktop loads
steps: Navigate to the desktop app URL
Take a snapshot of the page
tests.pass_criteria: Page title contains 'Ancient Texts', no console errors, main content area exists

tests.name: Library grid renders
steps: Count the number of text cards visible
Verify cards have titles and category badges
tests.pass_criteria: .library-grid exists with 70+ text cards showing titles

tests.name: Sidebar renders
steps: Verify sidebar has navigation items or tools section
Check sidebar buttons exist (glossary, map, etc.)

tests.name: Mobile loads
steps: Navigate to the mobile app URL
Wait up to 15 seconds for loading overlay to dismiss
Check that loading overlay is hidden
tests.pass_criteria: Loading overlay dismisses within 15s, no critical console errors

tests.name: Mobile library renders
steps: After mobile loads, check for library content
Verify text cards or list items render
tests.pass_criteria: Library content visible, bottom nav bar with 5 buttons present
